title: Cuneiform Tablet #0656: Hellenistic Tax Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a tax record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a tax record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Tax Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records tax record matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
